# Rarely Done Well

> An entrepreneurship ecosystem for founders building physical goods and hospitality brands. Based in San Antonio, serving South Texas. Est. 2026.

Rarely Done Well supports founders through three programs: The Community (monthly membership, mentorship, meetups), The Accelerator (10-week cohort program, Spring and Fall, for founders 0–2 years in), and The Incubator (year-long strategic partnership for brands seeking scale). The organization has a 10+ year track record, 27,000+ entrepreneurs supported, $10M+ in capital facilitated, and a 1:63 return on investment. It has received national recognition including an SBA Accelerate Growth Competition win and a Presidential Proclamation. Institutional partnerships include the City of San Antonio, Lift Fund, LISC, and Kroger.

## Pages

- [Home](https://www.rarelydonewell.com/): Mission, manifesto, and ecosystem overview
- [The Background](https://www.rarelydonewell.com/learn-more.html): Origin story, methodology, track record, and alumni brands
- [The Community](https://www.rarelydonewell.com/community.html): Monthly membership — $84/year, for physical goods and hospitality founders in San Antonio
- [The Accelerator](https://www.rarelydonewell.com/accelerator.html): 10-week cohort program — $1,800 full price, Spring and Fall cohorts, money-back guarantee
- [The Incubator](https://www.rarelydonewell.com/incubator.html): Year-long strategic partnership — starting at $750/month retainer, inquiry only
- [For Partners](https://www.rarelydonewell.com/partners.html): Institutional partnerships — government, EDC, corporate innovation, policy, and ecosystem design
